en_title: Some Retailers Are Refusing to Sell GTA 6 Due to the Lack of a Disc
cn_title: 部分零售商拒绝销售《GTA6》实体版：因不含光盘
subtitle: 无盘不卖
opus_summary: 多家零售商因《侠盗猎车手6》实体版不含光盘而拒绝销售，认为数字码损害实体介质价值。实体版仅含数字码，11月12日率先推出以供预载。

paragraphs.en: Two video game retailers have announced that they will not be selling Grand Theft Auto 6 due to the highly-anticipated title not releasing on a disc.
paragraphs.cn: 两家游戏零售商已宣布不会销售《侠盗猎车手6》，因为这款备受期待的作品并没有光盘版。

paragraphs.en: Video Games Plus, a gaming retailer based out of Canada, and an independent gaming retailer known as Loot Box Gaming have both stated that they won't be selling GTA 6. Rockstar Games confirmed this morning that GTA 6's physical version will not include a disc . Instead, players will be able to pick up a boxed copy that includes a digital code. The physical version will release on November 12th, a week ahead of the game's release, so that players can pre-download the game using the code.
paragraphs.cn: 加拿大的游戏零售商Video Games Plus和独立游戏零售商Loot Box Gaming均表示不会销售《GTA6》。Rockstar今早确认，《GTA6》实体版不包含光盘。取而代之的是，玩家将能购买到一个带有数字兑换码的盒装版本。实体版将于11月12日发售，比游戏正式上线早一周，以便玩家使用兑换码预先下载游戏。

paragraphs.en: Video Game Plus pointed to its policy of not selling games that only offer digital codes, and as a result, it will not sell the biggest game of 2026. The retailer noted that this isn't a reflection of Rockstar Games or the game itself, but argued that it's part of their goal of preserving physical media.
paragraphs.cn: Video Games Plus提到其政策是不销售仅提供数字兑换码的游戏，因此它不会销售2026年这款最重磅的作品。该零售商指出，此举并非针对Rockstar或《GTA6》本身，而是出于他们保护实体媒体的目标。

paragraphs.en: “For nearly 40 years, VGP has been committed to supporting physical media and preserving the value of physical game ownership,” reads a statement from VGP. “As part of that commitment, our company policy is that we do not carry physical products for video game consoles that contain only a digital download code. Based on the information currently available, the physical release of Grand Theft Auto 6 for the PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X is expected to be a code-in-box product. As a result, VGP will not be offering it for sale under our current company policy.”
paragraphs.cn: VGP发布的声明中写道：「近40年来，VGP一直致力于支持实体媒体，维护实体游戏所有权的价值。作为这一承诺的一部分，我们的公司政策是不销售仅包含数字下载代码的家用游戏机实体产品。根据目前已知的信息，《GTA6》面向PS5和XBOX Series X的实体版本预计将采用盒装内放数字兑换码的形式。因此，按照我司现行政策，VGP将不会出售该产品。」

paragraphs.en: Loot Box Gaming echoed a similar philosophy, noting that since GTA 6 doesn't come with a disc, it won't sell the game.
paragraphs.cn: Loot Box Gaming也表达了类似的理念，指出既然《GTA6》不附带光盘，他们就不会销售这款游戏。

paragraphs.en: "When we started LBG, it was out of a love for our favorite form of media, gaming, as-well as the preservation of said media," said the company. "If a product can’t honor the people who pay their hard-earned money to purchase it, then we have no business trying to sell it to our customers whom we value above anything else."
paragraphs.cn: 该公司表示：「我们创办LBG是出于对游戏这一我们最喜爱的媒介形式的热爱，同时也是为了保护这种媒介。如果一款产品无法尊重那些用血汗钱购买它的人，那么我们就没有资格把它卖给我们的顾客，而顾客是我们最看重的。」

paragraphs.en: GTA 6's lack of a disc appears to be a security measure from Rockstar Games in order to prevent leaks and control access to the game ahead of launch. Given that it's arguably the most anticipated release in entertainment history, there are concerns that the game could get taken from a manufacturing plant, fall off a truck, or be sold early by retailers, leading to leaks. Perhaps Rockstar will release a physical version with a disc in 2027 once all the hype has died down.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》不含光盘似乎是Rockstar Games的一项安全措施，旨在防止游戏在发售前被泄露并控制访问。考虑到这很可能是娱乐史上最受期待的作品，人们担心游戏可能会从生产工厂被盗、从卡车上掉落，或被零售商提前出售，从而导致泄密。也许在2027年所有炒作平息后，Rockstar会推出带光盘的实体版本。

paragraphs.en: Major retailers like GameStop, Amazon, and Best Buy will likely carry the game in November, as they aren't known to have issues with physical games that substitute a digital code over a disc. Of course, you'll also be able to buy the game from the Xbox and PlayStation stores if you want to cut out the middleman.
paragraphs.cn: GameStop、亚马逊和百思买等大型零售商可能会在11月上架该游戏，因为它们通常不排斥以数字兑换码替代光盘的实体游戏。当然，如果你不想经过中间商，也可以直接从XBOX和PlayStation商店购买。

paragraphs.en: GTA 6 pre-orders have officially begun in New Zealand and will continue to roll out as the clock strikes midnight in various regions. The standard edition of the game will cost $79.99 , but there will also be an Ultimate Edition for $99.99. The Ultimate Edition has been the subject of controversy , as it will provide exclusive access to certain stores, missions, cars, weapons, and cosmetic items in-game.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》的预购已在新西兰正式开启，并将在各地区午夜钟声敲响时陆续推出。游戏标准版售价79.99美元(约合人民币545元)，另外还有售价99.99美元(约合人民币681元)的终极版。终极版一直存在争议，因为它将提供某些游戏内商店、任务、车辆、武器和外观物品的独家访问权。

paragraphs.en: GTA 6 will release on November 19th for Xbox Series X|S and PS5.
Cade Onder is a freelancer for IGN's news team. He covers all things entertainment, including gaming, film, and more. You can find him on Twitter @Cade_Onder.
paragraphs.cn: Cade Onder是IGN新闻团队的自由撰稿人，报道各类娱乐内容，包括游戏和电影等。你可以在X上找到他 @Cade_Onder。
